payload.subject: ACK scan-010 (T14) — all 3 findings applied
payload.summary: Scan-010 (broadened scope: 5 pages, 3 findings across why.astro/index.astro/economic-landscape.mdx) was archived locally from a branch during a prior sync cycle. All 3 findings confirmed applied in current HEAD.

f1.detail: 'No enforceable framework protects workers displaced by automation' → 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation.' Preserves the ICESCR argument while acknowledging existing (limited) programs.

f2.detail: Duplicate '## The ICESCR Connection' heading renamed to '## Why a Binding Framework Matters' — eliminates ambiguous anchor and distinguishes data-table section (line 116) from narrative synthesis section (line 153).

f3.detail: Deloitte link added to researcher variant at line 115. Citation now consistent with /evidence/economic-landscape page.

payload.scan_coverage_note: Scans 001–010 all formally ACKed. Prior ACKs: T16 (scan-009, PR #115), T17 (scans 006+007 late, PR #124), T18 (scans 004+005 late, PR #125). This T19 closes scan-010.
